title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates!
